name: Fumi 14x32 Tiny Home Plan - Modern Compact Living with Timeless Style
open_features: Modern minimalist architecture designed for compact residential lots, ADU conversions, and lifestyle-focused backyard builds.
Straightforward framing, clean wall lines, and easy-to-follow layout options are perfect for both first-time builders and pros.
A well-placed front entry paired with large, thoughtfully positioned windows creates bright interiors with refreshing airflow.
Warm wood lap siding, crisp trim accents, and a sleek lean-to roof deliver a modern, timeless exterior with rustic personality.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Fumi Tiny Home - a 14x32 modern living, working, and retreat-ready space designed for efficiency, beauty, and clean architectural lines. With its streamlined single-slope roof, warm wood siding, and crisp contemporary styling, Fumi blends form and function effortlessly. Whether you're creating a full tiny home, a guesthouse hideaway, a generous home office, or a creative maker studio, the 14x32 Fumi offers smart space planning, DIY-friendly constr...
